sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { SparklesIcon, ChartBarIcon, DocumentTextIcon, AcademicCapIcon, CheckCircleIcon, ArrowRightIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon, LightBulbIcon, ClockIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; const Home = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); const features = [ { icon: DocumentTextIcon, title: "Upload Resume", description: "Upload your resume in PDF or DOCX format for AI analysis.", color: "bg-blue-50", iconColor: "text-blue-600" }, { icon: MagnifyingGlassIcon, title: "Job Description", description: "Paste any job description and compare with your resume.", color: "bg-purple-50", iconColor: "text-purple-600" }, { icon: ChartBarIcon, title: "ATS Score", description: "Get your ATS compatibility score with improvement tips.", color: "bg-green-50", iconColor: "text-green-600" }, { icon: AcademicCapIcon, title: "Skill Matching", description: "See which skills match and which need improvement.", color: "bg-orange-50", iconColor: "text-orange-600" }, { icon: LightBulbIcon, title: "Smart Suggestions", description: "Receive personalized recommendations to optimize your resume.", color: "bg-yellow-50", iconColor: "text-yellow-600" }, { icon: ClockIcon, title: "Analysis History", description: "Track all your past analyses and progress.", color: "bg-indigo-50", iconColor: "text-indigo-600" } ]; if (user) { window.location.href = '/dashboard'; return null; } return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Land Your Dream Job

Get instant ATS scores, skill matching, and personalized suggestions to optimize your resume for any job role.

{/* Features Section */}

Powerful Features for Job Seekers

Everything you need to optimize your resume and stand out

{features.map((feature, index) => (

{feature.title}

{feature.description}

))}
{/* How It Works */}

How It Works

Get your resume analyzed in 4 simple steps

{[ { step: 1, title: "Create Account", desc: "Sign up for free" }, { step: 2, title: "Upload Resume", desc: "Upload PDF or DOCX" }, { step: 3, title: "Paste Job Description", desc: "Copy from job posting" }, { step: 4, title: "Get Analysis", desc: "Instant AI insights" } ].map((step, index) => (
{step.step}

{step.title}

{step.desc}

))}
{/* CTA Section */}

Ready to Land Your Dream Job?

Join thousands of successful job seekers using ResumeAI

); }; export default Home;
